title: Class 0 E004 gas emergency scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative E004-aligned gas-detected emergency path. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish an E004 gas-detected emergency payload through the registry-aligned emergency ingress plane or a controlled bridge that produces policy-router-compatible input.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the emergency routing outcome.

notes: Dedicated E004 gas-detected payload fixture now available in sample_policy_router_input_class0_e004_gas.json.
This scenario validates gas-detected state trigger semantics and is aligned with the required experiments document's canonical emergency family coverage.
Class 0 emergency handling must not use the LLM as the primary decision path.
doorbell_detected is not emergency evidence and does not authorize doorlock control.
